descripcion:
house tour!!!!!!!! I’m so grateful to my beautiful brilliant partner in crime @isimostar for directing this adventure of a video with me, and of course to my darling @madelyncline for bringing her excellence and charm to every frame🌷
We shot on vista vision in the Hollywood hills very late into the night.. this was a very ambitious hardworking crew i am incredibly grateful for 🩷hope you love it as much as we loved making it! 

directed by – @sabrinacarpenter & @isimostar

starring – @sabrinacarpenter @isimostar & @madelyncline

cd – @sarahcarpenter @sabrinacarpenter
production company – @freenjoy
founder / producer – nathan scherrer
ep / producer – @tarasheree
producers – @aidenmagarian @volaramgmt 
dp – @christopher.c.ripley
camera – @adam__hull
pd – @mirandalorenz
styling – @jaredellner
makeup – @cgonzalezbeauty @dianebuzzetta @jentioseco
hair – @evaniefrausto @janineraththompson @zacharymorad
nails – @nailsbyzola
choreographer – @mssjb
editor – @sofiakerpan
color – @talbaltuch".

all my personalities 
thank you Katie!!! @kegrand @theperfectmagazine 
shot by @brvceanderson".

Sabrinawood weekend 1!!!!!! 💫⭐️✨
what a celebration of beautiful amazing brilliant individuals i got to make this with. thank you to the crowd for showing up, waiting in the scorching sun, and singing every word

@brettalannelson @sarahcarpenter @mssjb @volaramgmt @stufishstudio @silenthousegroup @krispooley @jaredellner and so many more 🌹

special thank you to the most special guests. The great Susan Sarandon, Will Ferrell, Sam Elliot, Samuel L. Jackson, and Corey Fogelmanis, for being part of this show 

Many more thoughts to come… See you next week, Coachella!".
pit stop on my way to Sabrinawood for weekend 2🌹 @airbnb".

Coachella weekend 2 might take the damn cake 

Madonna ..…I’ve got something i wanna talk about! 💋💋💋 thank you for coming out, bringing your love, and gracing the audience with everything you are + astrology knowledge + the greatest songs of all time. Last night was straight out of a dream. spending so much time laughing with you and then above all sharing the stage with you is a privilege I’ll never forget. x 

special thank you @geenadavis @terrycrews @coreyfogelmanis for sharing your infinite talent with us!!! 

This show and everyone involved is so beyond special to me. Sabrinawood forever!".

Hey men!! Manchild music video is out NOW 
it’s exactly what i pictured in my head 🐷

no animals were harmed in the making but some men were 

directed by @gmuggia @vaniaheymann".

My new album, “Man’s Best Friend” 🐾
is out on August 29, 2025.

i can’t wait for it to be yours x 

Pre-order now".

house tour video is out now!! 

Starring the prettiest cleanup crew in the world, my sweet @isimostar and my angel @madelyncline

So much more to say but first go watch the video x".
